title: Overworld Ores
description: A mod aimed to add more ores into the overworld. Equipped with metals, alloys, more gems and even Meteorite!
body:
# This mod is no longer being updated

![About Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/674c2ecc3250ab171223523522ab26c3e112352f.png)

This mod aims to add more interest to your cave adventures by adding 9 more ores, 2 biomes and 2 building block sets. Progress further beyond Netherite or take it slow starting builds and have a chat with the Cave Miner Villager!
![Overworld Ores Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b8564d2b7934fb0bf00e616f1da6bac9b0c7a8c.png)

## Information
For version Minecraft 1.20.1 Forge, no dependecies are needed.

Bugs are too be expected so please report them by going to the Github link or in my Discord

You are freely allowed to use this mod in any modpack or video.

## FAQ
### Are there plans on porting to any newer or previous versions?

Previous backports are not planned and won't be attempted.

### Will this mod be ported to Fabric?

 No Fabric versions are currently planned.
